title: OverDurability
description: Shows item durability in the lore
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/otDUz5vUv-g" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

A lightweight, optimized Minecraft plugin that shows item durability directly in the lore using customizable placeholders.

Perfect for **Survival**, **PvP**, or **RPG** servers where item condition matters.

✨ **Features**
- Lore placeholders (%od_durability%, %od_max_durability%)
- Fully configurable
- Performance optimized
- Compatible with modern Minecraft versions
- Automatically updates lore when applying the command

📋 **Commands**
```
/overdurability apply – Applies placeholders to the item in your hand
/overdurability reload – Reloads the plugin configuration
```

⚙️ **Installation**

1. Download the plugin.
2. Place the .jar file in your /plugins folder.
3. Restart or reload your server.
4. Customize the language.yml if desired.
5. Add %od_durability% and %od_max_durability% to your item's lore.
6. Use /overdurability apply and you’re ready!

SUPPORT [DISCORD](https://discord.gg/jreCQVxsfr) SERVER
